Package com.rays.ctl

Class LoginCtl

java.lang.Object
com.rays.common.BaseCtl<UserForm,UserDTO,UserServiceInt>
com.rays.ctl.LoginCtl
@RestController @RequestMapping("Auth") public class LoginCtl extends BaseCtl<UserForm,UserDTO,UserServiceInt>
Controller for authentication-related operations. Handles login, signup, logout, and forgot password functionality.
Author:
Saket

      @Autowired private JWTUtil jwtUtil
      JWT utility for token generation.

      public LoginCtl()

  • Method Details

    • login

      @PostMapping("login") public ORSResponse login(@RequestBody @Valid @Valid LoginForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, javax.servlet.http.HttpSession session, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request) throws Exception
      Handles user login authentication.
      Parameters:
      form - Login form containing credentials
      bindingResult - validation result
      session - HTTP session
      request - HTTP request
      Returns:
      ORSResponse with login result and token
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication fails

    • signUp

      @PostMapping("signUp") public ORSResponse signUp(@RequestBody @Valid @Valid UserRegistrationForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Registers a new user (signup).
      Parameters:
      form - User registration form
      bindingResult - validation result
      Returns:
      ORSResponse with registration status

    • logout

      @GetMapping("logout") public ORSResponse logout(javax.servlet.http.HttpSession session) throws Exception
      Logs out the current user session.
      Parameters:
      session - HTTP session
      Returns:
      ORSResponse with logout message
      Throws:
      Exception

    • forgetPassword

      @PostMapping("forgetPassword") public ORSResponse forgetPassword(@RequestBody @Valid @Valid ForgetPasswordForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Handles forgot password request.
      Parameters:
      form - Forget password form
      bindingResult - validation result
      Returns:
      ORSResponse with status message
